| | Peter --

We've got 8 hours left to hit our $20,000 goal. I checked our numbers, and **we're still $6,938 short!**

Republicans are absolutely salivating over the possibility of stealing this seat during the special election run-off. I know I can count on you to make sure that doesn't happen.

**[Hitting every fundraising goal is how we make sure Christy holds onto this seat. Pitch in now so we have the resources to win:](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b83b/29776869/ac313eb/569f9d55/1377126346/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDZfMjRob3VyZ29hbDItczEifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200306_24hourgoal2-s1")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b83b/29776869/ac313eb/569f9d55/1377126346/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDZfMjRob3VyZ29hbDItczEifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200306_24hourgoal2-s1") More than 852,000 ballots still haven't been counted in LA and Ventura counties. And, surprisingly, the gap between our two Republican opponents seems to be narrowing.

We'll keep you updated as ballots come in.

But this changes absolutely nothing for us. No matter who we face, the national Republican special interests are chomping at the bit at a chance to flip this seat.

**[The only way we stop them is by making sure we have the resources to compete. Chip in $5 or more immediately.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b83b/29776869/ac313eb/569f9d55/1377126346/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDZfMjRob3VyZ29hbDItczEifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200306_24hourgoal2-s1")**

name: Doyle Canning
subject: No More Anti-Immigrant Democrats in 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
I will do all I can to defund and hold accountable those responsible for abuse and mistreatment of immigrants and asylum seekers, and will support immigration reform | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EQE/ni0YAA/t.2zv/c1ZKWCGiSG2usyvtTUn1iQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH7186J1utNasedb3atdJt8cg4RWJSfP-2B17wllFiIMvWkwyC8hfm1PhS0q0PfadDt9yTmsz6s3-2BvNw7PfJC6O52FEUSQLiQLM2hHOPfw-2F2uw-2BWWTciBYsFHQiKLAiOBuZyucZKc7ML3j-2BUIhrS1ryvlEf-2FGRrI-2FIDzYqT-2F8Enqxo0FEg-3D/g5nW)

Hi Friend, This photo was taken in 2005 in Immokalee, Florida. I was training and supporting student activists and farmworker leaders from the Coalition of Immokalee Workers (CIW) to take on the entire fast food industry because of the modern day slavery conditions in the tomato fields and rampant abuses of immigrant workers. Supporting the struggle in Immokalee remains one of the greatest honors of my life. That's why I am proud to stand with the CIW, RAICES, and other leading voices for immigrant rights who are calling for a new immigration agenda: the [**Migrant Justice Platform.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EQE/ni0YAA/t.2zv/c1ZKWCGiSG2usyvtTUn1iQ/h1/r7tK7NNGIBIpzfg5ZWS3wR-2FaaAGmcDczNttPyu4Ai-2Blv-2BBhscnRclN89JQPAwPKhqUGDM8ZWdGFoKsOOgTBdf7UnlikmebkrfHA-2BW1ADqnQbi9UKvXetlWcqRaJHgWwqhgCjrPiucTis0DVaVAXt0NWAFJ2YBpRzONlNel8KbcifxUfdrTN4RZcbKT4kja5nwMKesbfNG8eejb9Cy0cIdeZJY7fULg41fEn-2Fed-2BHU9Ej5gGoxoiJQnPmnQ1k7ZP2Tm9cjwrXYdh0-2FA4Y3ChtIKP72iJblKf595VkSGlsSyU-3D/Iqxa) Their plan provides a roadmap to begin to heal our country from the Trump Administration's white nationalist atrocities, and provide a new vision for immigration policy that respects human rights, and it has my full support. Immigrant workers deserve dignity and respect on the job, regardless of documentation status. Congress must act to change the laws to allow people who live, work, raise families, and pay taxes in the US to become full citizens. I will do all I can to defund and hold accountable those responsible for abuse and mistreatment of immigrants and asylum seekers. I am taking a stand so that all members of our communities - no matter the zip code, country of origin, color, or creed - are free to stay and put down roots, free to move to pursue opportunities, and free to thrive as members of a multi-cultural America. The scars of Trump's cruel, racist, and inhumane policy will last a lifetime for tens of thousands of children and their families, and I believe our country must do everything possible to make amends. I am running for Congress because we can't count on [anti-immigrant Democrats like DeFazio](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EQE/ni0YAA/t.2zv/c1ZKWCGiSG2usyvtTUn1iQ/h2/3r-2B9H4kRwZGWVwt8Jac9QlvG9GxBfRmb5QVzQCa5hHOBZme3f1pV3GncuM-2BmeWMfJo8qd8gekQalNiWvqkRGbhY0ZSs3dZSYAAGR2F2adAxqNpW-2FBOYAd2PzEu3nKVWw6f7rCWkQj3M6wJ27hkSu08dG5m4EF4E5nyISStwvQDj0anmeDhqTtJD9mtnHFHOMG-2FCjByugMYG0jwEVEE4DIPJXKupi1k30uLB7Ekq3DK0YqbtzYzRnffYuBT5USOgenrJeVKFBHEBkqv0tasSGIWzcyLi2Wx4YrUoVNLnXD1a3Nb7RfSBJuvoj6tY-2FtatK4Aa-2F9x5yvjUH-2FiLHz02bxMmrTXAbOBzbyM1bJU28HGh2las9uQMBqn7hoTpwaNdydTaQ1EO0X8L1SENxy33BLVKxwKd1875ZZpddkvKI92QLdaVIVZLLvpHCYTt3jRHC/DgcA), who have been working to criminalize and punish immigrants for 30 years, to lead the movement for healing and change. You can count on me to fight for this vision, and stay true to my 20 years of service in movements for racial, economic, and environmental justice. [**I am asking you to join me in this fight by chipping in to tell the Democratic Establishment that we will not look away and we will take a stand for migrant justice. **](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EQE/ni0YAA/t.2zv/c1ZKWCGiSG2usyvtTUn1iQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0RrXTMsgpMVixuEZwp9uPDV7qBTYpWu78fONtzFvAmVBZDjBtEZlno116whfoOPtOLHoJGJ-2BIZU62mvB4HJ0NbUtNKr9Z9RYiZiUxNjV-2BSwG6ETU3yBwumeU5T7-2Bfz2-2BUHEGB-2BjfzYF-2FhYl-2F53k4QKehuM0ydzLAq2He9RJYoIv-2B8x2wwRZLbasR0ZPRWh3U7Q0Q1NNMSj8SL-2FUz-2BatUSt11X7fVyB0isb5XgVEywsXwISEgVxqcGxGXgzpQkuzIX/AGlR)
---
[ **DONATE TODAY** ](?link_id=6&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-defazio-is-dangerous-for-our-climate&email_referrer=email_742511&email_subject=no-more-anti-immigrant-democrats-in-2020)
---
Together we can affirm the human rights and dignity of every person entering the United States, and transform our immigration policy to keep families together permanently. The Migrant Justice Platform recommends concrete executive and congressional actions to ensure undocumented, TPS, DED, and DACA sisters and brothers breathe free without fear of persecution, emphasizing workers' rights within immigration policy, a new de-militarized approach to the borderlands, and a rethinking of the U.S. impact and role abroad. This agenda is coming from the grassroots leaders working on the ground to fight for migrant rights, and I will do all I can to amplify and support their vision when I serve in Congress. Onward, Doyle Canning
---
|
---
|
---
Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! [You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EQE/ni0YAA/t.2zv/c1ZKWCGiSG2usyvtTUn1iQ/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJfvvN8qBuq7ZECa2iJJ-2FwvGbJPhyleJrnGTMr5NxKZ-2FQrJ3RxXOjCjB3Cu-2Fox6tGh5XFw-2Fsznl9DX1tqF0z59SFOS4vMPrVF2SdLHrIp3bug7ahknsWuDDZE-2BKohSSt4psSMU8ky2fmfkLKduQn380xK6XLzIHz1gqK8hxIO-2FeyynDdCMc4e0zCZyenDHm05tGZTEAirhUwJUrkwfYzi84EFoZo3qShICGxCIueTix76FCEl6-2FdbkPmVvCAr7ICYfxNrmrKx42tbUITksyD0L8/Ts0I "Donate to Doyle Canning")

You can count on me to fight for this vision, and stay true to my 20 years of service in movements for racial, economic, and environmental justice. ?linkid=6&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-defazio-is-dangerous-for-our-climate&emailreferrer=email742511&email_subject=no-more-anti-immigrant-democrats-in-2020 Together we can affirm the human rights and dignity of every person entering the United States, and transform our immigration policy to keep families together permanently. The Migrant Justice Platform recommends concrete executive and congressional actions to ensure undocumented, TPS, DED, and DACA sisters and brothers breathe free without fear of persecution, emphasizing workers' rights within immigration policy, a new de-militarized approach to the borderlands, and a rethinking of the U.S. impact and role abroad. This agenda is coming from the grassroots leaders working on the ground to fight for migrant rights, and I will do all I can to amplify and support their vision when I serve in Congress. | Friend,

This Tuesday, we overwhelmingly won our primary and are headed towards the general election in November.

In the primary, we ran a positive campaign that focused on our shared vision for the country and how we can find solutions to some of our biggest challenges. That's why I was shocked to see men working on my opponent's campaign spreading conspiracy theories and disparaging comments about me and our campaign. One even singled out a member of my staff by name on Twitter.

**This is exactly the kind of toxic politics voters rejected this week when our campaign won by a wide margin.**

I'm running because I want young people, especially women and girls, to see that they can make a difference. These kinds of attacks from men are meant to silence our voices and tell us we're not good enough. This is the tone my opponent's team set on the first day of the general election. **Candidates should not tolerate this kind of behavior from their staff.**

Thank you,

Sara

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Selma
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_I3tslWW19Is5fQoWQwK55FbyzRMujk8VLnwRuBr9-Y=/VsEBR8WdM1i0zERVMCENfMb-0kHQ9iXZKaTPcTQv_7o=)
---
| Folks, **On this day 55 years ago, Rep. John Lewis led hundreds of civil rights activists in the march that became known as "Bloody Sunday."** They planned to march from Selma to Montgomery, Alabama to protest suppression of black voices at the ballot box. But when they reached the Edmund Pettus Bridge -- less than a mile from the start of the march -- they were viciously attacked by state troopers wielding billy clubs and tear gas. The footage of unprovoked violence in Selma galvanized Americans and led to the landmark Voting Rights Act of 1965. **55 years later, we continue to fight some of the same battles that civil rights activists did.** Republicans around the country are still passing and implementing racist voter ID laws, closing polling places in black communities, and gerrymandering districts to silence minority voices. I remain inspired by those who risked everything to ensure folks like me could take part in democracy, and I remain committed to continuing that fight until _**every**_ American citizen can freely exercise the right to vote. Thanks for standing with me. Onwards, \-- Congressman Al Green | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/_I3tslWW19Is5fQoWQwK55FbyzRMujk8VLnwRuBr9-Y=/iio1LNE0bHB1PSS9Jp937mJyi_Sgb3UH30Fv1dIwOk4=?refcode=E1676-20200307-Selma-SB&amount=25)**

| Friends, **When Andy Barr ran for this seat in 2011, he said that his “top priority will be to stop Washington’s reckless spending spree and work to avert a national debt crisis.”** But just a few years later, Andy went right ahead and voted to give $2 trillion (yes, that’s trillion with a T) to corporations and the wealthiest Americans when he voted for the Tax Cuts & Jobs Act. And then he turned around, with other Republicans, and suggested cutting Medicaid and student loans. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15821930/167367777/411554307?refcode=20200307_em_fr_atest_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg2YWEzMi05MTYwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OiVe6RhYpbuxml6Umj05EJay44ZjmPXyoiRXWHjSYU=) **Andy Barr’s top priority isn’t addressing the debt — it’s signalling to his big donors that he’ll do whatever it takes to keep them happy.** First, cut their taxes. Then, slash spending on programs we need the most. I know, I shouldn’t be surprised by the hypocrisy anymore. But when it comes to the livelihoods of everyday Kentuckians, I can’t help but be mad. We deserve better than what we’ve got. We deserve a government that works for us. name: Team Dietzen
subject: Weekly Roundup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/a2f12f59d1771fbb/8f960fd1f7c07a77c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Date: March 7, 2020 | |
---
**CATCH UP WITH DR. CHUCK:**
**ENDORSEMENTS**

Fellow Doctor and Retired USAF Brig. General John P. McGoff

"As a fellow physician, Dr. Chuck has the heart and dedication to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District. His service to not just our community, but around the world shows me that he can listen and work with people from all walks of life. Will you join and help me send Dr. Chuck Dietzen to Congress?"
Marion City Councilor Brian Cowgill

"Dr. Chuck Dietzen is a man of the highest degree of integrity. His years of dedicated work as a Doctor in our state, country and on a global level to underprivileged children, who have been suffering from various physical ailments, has made a positive difference in their young lives. Dr. Chuck is the kind of man that we desperately need in Washington right now. I encourage you to join me to help put a Doctor in the House!"

|
---
**FROM THE TRAIL**
**Lawrence Township GOP Dinner**
**
**My team and I had a wonderful time at the Lawrence Township Republican Club dinner this past Friday. It was nice chatting with old friends, meeting new ones and hearing from Speaker Brian Bosma about his career in the Indiana General Assembly.
**Howard County Republican Party Candidate Forum **

It was good to be home this past Saturday in Howard County for the Howard County Republican Century Club Event. Thank you to all who came out to hear why I want to become your next Congressman, also a huge thanks to the Howard County GOP leaders and volunteers for the hard work you put into making this a huge success!

|
---
**Reception in Kokomo**

It was great to see old friends and family at the reception this past week in Kokomo at the Columbian Club.

**Pike Township GOP Club Dinner**

I had a great time meeting new people and entertaining the next generation at the Pike Township GOP Club dinner as well this past week. Congratulations to Indiana Federation of Republican Women Chair Monica Kozlowski for receiving the State Republican Chairman’s award from Kyle Hupfer!

|
---
**Noblesville All County Chamber Breakfast**

Also, this past week I had the opportunity to attend the Noblesville Chamber of Commerce, all county networking breakfast. So many positive things are happening in and around Hamilton County and it shows with these awesome leaders we have in our community.

**Carmel Reception**

Thank you to Topper Doehring for hosting a reception in support of my campaign, it was truly an honor to have so many Doctors and medical professionals showing up to help send me to Congress!

|
---
**Upcoming Events**
Boone County Republican Party Social
Wednesday, March 11th
5:30pm – 7:30pm
Rush on Main
Zionsville, Indiana

Fishers GOP Club Meeting
Thursday, March 12th
6pm – 8pm
Ale Emporium
11501 Geist Pavillion Dr, Suite 100
Fishers, Indiana

Coffee with the Candidate
Thursday, March 12th
8:30am – 9:30am
9th Street Café
1802 W. 9th St
Marion, Indiana

Tipton County GOP Dinner
Saturday, March 14th
6pm – 8pm
Tipton County Fairgrounds
1200 S. Main St
Tipton, Indiana

I know what working families in Ohio are going through, because I'm going through it too. [**Donate now to help me represent OUR interests -- not the special interests of the elite, like Republican Steve Chabot. Pitch in ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkfmonthlymarch?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200307_MyStory_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Donate+now+to+help+me+represent+OUR+inte&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200307_MyStory_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200307_MyStory_U2_X1") | | | [Chip in ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkfmonthlymarch?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200307_MyStory_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200307_MyStory_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200307_MyStory_U2_X1")

* * *
I'm a working mom, balancing two wonderful kids between my husband's and my full-time schedules. **If you 've juggled parenthood and professional life, you know me.**
I'm a veteran of the U.S. Air Force, having proudly served my country in 200+ combat missions -- and having led half of them. **If you 've dedicated yourself to any of the branches of our military, you know me.**
I'm a daughter of immigrants who worked day in and day out to provide for our family. **If you 've lived in awe and appreciation for the sacrifices your parents made for you, you know me.**
And I'm intimately familiar with the flaws of our healthcare system, having watched my newborn baby struggle in the Intensive Care Unit -- knowing that if I wasn't lucky enough to have decent health insurance, I'd be going bankrupt to save my son. **If you 've struggled to afford to keep your family healthy, you know me.**
I'm going to fight like hell to give our story a happy ending. For our parents, our families, and our country. For us.
**But I can 't win that fight without your help.** I'm rejecting corporate PAC money because I want my movement to be people-powered, not funded by special interests.
That means that I'm at a fundraising disadvantage against Chabot -- he's taken millions from corporate PACs during his career. Friend,

Eric is committed to talking with Hoosiers across Indiana. It’s a key part of Putting People First.

_That’s why he stopped in Vanderburgh County and Marion County’s Perry Township last month to speak at their Lincoln Day Dinners and join them in celebrating America’s greatest president (and a native Hoosier!)._
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=29f9babe01314f4bb00058268d73d799&_e=EacwhH7mDJN-n21XwIW3ot0nR4PD5nt2UrjBE3kWZMj6D1TwByr6iwSclADx0dDfiDuYPd5zluWhHr9aLm5AIpEMQf3pC1cb9KafTTae_PmabGGWjq9HjWMx7hULrvFv34P0LIOsnuHcjjg4n9zH2TVAcDmaEQyR168b5XeS7qyKNbVtYKbiGg1O6ivfNpuhHC-2o_QxmmUdu4H2KplZNCphSLsb4SY4Fj8LUBrw_U_X8lh6c4xnTDc_IEnYJ8aZfBmNt4ftydTsQw1CuDsaLmq1Q6vnLxcsxX4gvUfJYncco_sIAdpfZ5ZSdNX5tNmAJ-Jb4izAcxwvyFgEGVEjBX-3NSX0mDa8pU3MyUa55bPoVbw9ot7M3jpsJ25tVFr_bellEXWdLUN17c__uHOwZ9NsqoPv4zO4aLyHBGdkoFv444rrKafPR9yQy4wBj2uWSZrHpxm0zwS7KL6v1qtesX4aJXCxGjlLgTaxbHndX--1tw9hdLyMEQZJRbGLgvIB)
The whole crew had a great time and Eric was honored to share some of his thoughts on all the progress we’ve made as a state.

Eric spoke about our work with President Trump’s administration to skill up Hoosiers, help offenders get the skills they need to rebuild their lives, improve our infrastructure, and how Indiana’s success can be a model for other states and our country as a whole.

He also reminisced on his time working in Evansville (and the Burger King breakfasts that came with it).

body:

---

| | "Yes, I did vote to repeal the ACA," -Joni Ernst Just last week, the Supreme Court decided to take up a case that could overturn key provisions of the Affordable Care Act (ACA); the result, thousands of Iowans could lose their health care. Mike is not a fan of this. Our nation needs its citizens to be healthy. The ACA made a bold step in that direction, albeit imperfect. Dumping it, like some politicians wish, screams of special interest's push for profits over what's best for society. _[**Chip in to Admiral Mike 's campaign today -- he believes all Americans should be given the option to be covered by the type of comprehensive health care afforded him while serving this nation. **](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ff/33365068/4a6bfdd5/3f8be990/1555624488/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200306_ACA_em_fr_all_L1")_ But the Admiral's opponent doesn't. Joni voted to dismember and repeal the ACA multiple times, with no replacement. I'd think an Army officer would ensure Iowans had a parachute on before kicking them off their medical coverage. Don't like the metaphor? How 'bout marching through life without a medic in the formation? You don't do that in the Army so don't do it to Iowans. Iowa needs a leader in the U.S. Senate. No doubt, Admiral Mike has the track history, the record of success, and the vision Iowa needs across all segments of society. **Put him on the helm.** **To do so, we need your help. Our movement relies on you.[_We don 't take corporate PAC donations -- like the Big Pharma and insurance PACs that fund Ernst -- so please chip in today. _](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ff/33365068/4a6bfdd5/3f8be991/1555624488/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200306_ACA_em_fr_all_L2")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ff/33365068/4a6bfdd5/3f8be992/1555624488/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200306_ACA_em_fr_all_btn")
---
Thank you,
The Franken Crew

name: Thank You, Elizabeth Warren
subject: Peter: Can you sign our card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Senator Warren truly elevated the conversation in 2020. Peter, Elizabeth Warren ended her campaign for President this week: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d055e/72412298/4eb02abb/61041f30/100468972/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2") **She staked her unapologetically progressive campaign on making a more compassionate and equitable country for all that live here** \-- through universal healthcare, affordable childcare, student debt cancellation, and making the 1% pay their fair share. She also was a trailblazer in advocating for voting rights for all and securing our elections to protect our democracy. Her candidacy as a progressive woman made history -- **and her unrelenting honesty and willingness to rail against the status quo changed the tide of this race.** As we take today to reflect on the current presidential race, [**we 're asking you to step up and thank Elizabeth Warren for running an incredible campaign and moving the national conversation:**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d055e/72412298/4eb02abb/61041f33/100468972/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+wersquore+asking+you+to+step+up+and+than&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2") [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d055e/72412298/4eb02abb/61041f32/100468972/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2") | | | [Thank you!](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d055e/72412298/4eb02abb/61041f35/100468972/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Thank+you&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200307_ThanksWarren_U2_X2")

name: Rita Hart
subject: National Be Heard Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFajbBzyG4dMitAvHL853Z15VOa1vYmsSZ3OGdLUiBQ=/nQDzA7cQqAQFuM9f53o4Nh5PTflDOAHEAZ_WmtM7oe0=?refcode=200307-email) Peter, Today is National Be Heard Day, a day that invites small businesses to be heard above their giant corporate counterparts. Just like a small business, voices of everyday individuals can be drowned out or go unheard. I believe it is important to listen to every voice in the room -- because those small voices can have the biggest ideas. My mother suffered from heart failure when she was pregnant with my older brother. She raised all nine of us kids with just a whisper. Despite not being able to raise her voice, we could always tell when she was mad, she was sad, and when she needed our help. This taught me that you have to listen to every voice because often the voices you have to lean in to hear are the voices that can make the biggest difference in your life. **[I've been traveling around the district listening to every voice, every concern, and every hope resounding through this great district. Will you help me continue doing my duty of listening to the people by donating $10 today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFajbBzyG4dMitAvHL853Z15VOa1vYmsSZ3OGdLUiBQ=/M1fzrC1YAeYpiCV9Qwm-9fJzM7z3DAGzmmC4uVs0qgY=?refcode=200307-email&amount=10)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFajbBzyG4dMitAvHL853Z15VOa1vYmsSZ3OGdLUiBQ=/M1fzrC1YAeYpiCV9Qwm-9fJzM7z3DAGzmmC4uVs0qgY=?refcode=200307-email) Our country is founded upon the idea that our leaders in Washington are beholden to the people they represent. Through elections, we're able to pick the people who represent our best hopes for the future, and we're able to replace those who no longer serve us through a democratic process. A true leader has the humility to know that they are not acting alone but on behalf of the people who elected them. Your stories will always guide me to do what's best for our community when I'm representing you in Washington. **[Donate today to help me continue listening to every voice, and become a better leader because of it. I want to hear from every single person in Iowa's 2nd district so I can truly work to represent all of us.](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFajbBzyG4dMitAvHL853Z15VOa1vYmsSZ3OGdLUiBQ=/M1fzrC1YAeYpiCV9Qwm-9fJzM7z3DAGzmmC4uVs0qgY=?refcode=200307-email)** Thank you, Rita Hart | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

---

| | Mitch McConnell has a stranglehold on our political system, referring to himself as the "Grim Reaper of the Senate." He takes actual pride in blocking the meaningful, bold legislation that America desperately wants and needs. What's worse? He's using archaic Senate rules to his full advantage, holding up the filibuster to stop any and all progressive legislation in its tracks. **No more. We need to make sure the Senate represents the majority of Americans, not Mitch McConnell. It's time we abolish the filibuster. Sign if you agree:** [Abolish the Filibuster](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639004e/55b66746/23741089/80e3ebf/1204545738/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-the-filibuster/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-03-end-the-filibuster-email") We need bold reform in this country. Health care for all. Combatting the climate crisis. Immigration reform. Economic justice. True mental health parity. The only way we'll accomplish any of that is if we get rid of the old rules and old structures that were designed to benefit the few at the expense of the many. Our people deserve a political process that is inclusive, representative and fair. Joe is fighting for that every day. Join us. Let's end the filibuster. Restore power to the people's voices. \- Team Kennedy [Sign Your Name](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639004e/55b66746/23741089/80e3ebf/1204545738/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-the-filibuster/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-03-end-the-filibuster-email") |

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: 29% of Kansas women
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Friends --

Whether or not we see and hear about it, domestic violence is happening all around us. Here in Kansas, 29% of women and 23% of men have experienced physical violence, sexual violence, and/or stalking by an intimate partner in their lifetimes. That's why legislation like the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) is so critical to keeping people across the 2nd District and our country safe.

As a survivor of domestic violence myself, this fight is personal to me. Since it was first passed in 1994, VAWA has helped states facilitate programs aimed at preventing domestic violence, and has been critical in helping survivors like me get the protection they deserve.

Our leaders should be working to keep every citizen safe, and that's why I vow to fight for protections for survivors of domestic violence when I get to Congress.

**[Will you stand with me? Add your name to join me in support of the Violence Against Women Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15833564/167493274/1223635826?gpsid=8_122_12022&ms=em20_200306_VAWA_adv_gq_ful__MDLI_ettx&refcode=em20_200306_VAWA_adv_gq_ful__MDLI_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200306_VAWA_adv_gq_ful__MDLI_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTZkYWQ4NC1jODYwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ptiAUyZlwzmvVsDcm2XdhttmmczyP_-xfuMGg0Ua0Kk=&emci=5e121f5c-e15f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=916dad84-c860-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9593007)**

| | **_ CNN POLLING UPDATE:_
**Six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term****
---
Team, we haven't heard from you:

name: Team Christy
subject: Time to close the "boyfriend loophole" >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b838/29776869/ac3aa9c/569f9f45/3361815562/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | Peter,

Since it was first passed in 1994, the Violence Against Women Act is credited with reducing domestic violence by up to 60 percent -- but now, it lays in wait as Mitch McConnell and his Republican lackeys wait for the NRA's okay.

The House already passed a reauthorization bill that eliminates the "boyfriend loophole" -- a provision that keeps guns out of the hands of stalkers and abusers.

**[Yet Senate Republicans are more concerned with protecting their NRA blood money than protecting survivors' lives. We need a change, and we need it now. Add your name to our petition and demand the Senate reauthorize VAWA.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b838/29776869/ac3aa9c/569f9f46/3361815562/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDdfdmF3YXB0LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2003_email_christysmith_vawa?source=em20_200307_vawapt-s3")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b838/29776869/ac3aa9c/569f9f46/3361815562/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDdfdmF3YXB0LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2003_email_christysmith_vawa?source=em20_200307_vawapt-s3") It was seven years ago today that President Obama signed the last reauthorization of VAWA into law, but it lapsed nearly a year ago. And women across this country have been unprotected ever since.

Nearly one in every three California women will experience intimate partner physical violence in their lifetime.

Every day the Senate waits to reauthorize VAWA is a day that puts survivors and potential victims at risk. It is irresponsible and unethical to sit idly by.

**[We must act immediately. If you're with us, sign the petition today in support of survivors across the country.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b838/29776869/ac3aa9c/569f9f46/3361815562/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDdfdmF3YXB0LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2003_email_christysmith_vawa?source=em20_200307_vawapt-s3")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b838/29776869/ac3aa9c/569f9f46/3361815562/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDdfdmF3YXB0LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2003_email_christysmith_vawa?source=em20_200307_vawapt-s3") Thank you,

Peter -- We're already four days into the runoff and we have one question -- **what 's holding you back?** We're counting on your help to get MJ elected in November, but first we have to make sure MJ comes out of the runoff in the strongest position possible to defeat Sen. Cornyn. **There are two options -- which will you choose?**
**Option 1:[Make your first* donation to this campaign today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489028a/7f51f7bc/4c4546a6/4ef18ca0/1675755118/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200307.2nd__1021__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
If you choose this option, we'll be able to reach undecided voters across Texas and make sure they know all about MJ and make a plan to vote for her in this runoff. MJ will enter the next phase of this campaign with this powerful grassroots team alongside her, and be well-positioned to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.

**Option 2: You decide not to donate, hoping that others will step up.**
You assume that other people will step up, but everyone else assumes the same thing, and we start missing important fundraising goals and losing the momentum we've worked so hard to build. _Senator Cornyn wins reelection and spends another six years working against regular Texans._
**[**Make the right choice: Donate now >>>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489028a/7f51f7bc/4c4546a6/4ef18ca0/1675755118/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200307.2nd__1021__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Look, Peter -- _none of us_ wants to wake up the day after the election knowing we could have done more to defeat Sen. Cornyn and his special interest backers. But we're running out of time! That's why we're emailing you today.

MJ is relying on you. She doesn't have an army of corporate PACs backing her -- she has you. We can only win this together.

**[What's holding you back?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489028a/7f51f7bc/4c4546a6/4ef18ca0/1675755118/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200307.2nd__1021__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\-- Taylor Klos
TX Finance Director, MJ for Texas

name: Tina Smith
subject: This is a long email, but it’s important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
My friend, I can’t count the number of times folks have walked up to me and talked about how scared they are of losing their health care. Or not being able to afford putting food on the table or even their kid’s college tuition. Even though my name will be on the ballot in November, this race isn’t about me. It’s about folks like you. It’s about creating a future where no one lives in fear of getting sick because it could drive them into bankruptcy or going to college because it would saddle them with debt. I hate asking you to pitch in, I really do. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But I want you to know that every time I ask for your help, it’s because we need every dollar we can muster to build the kind of grassroots campaign that can knock out the wealthy donors and corporations trying to swing this election and stack the deck against everyday Americans. Every gift matters, no matter how large or small — and every penny you can spare is an investment in the work we’re doing to create a better future for all of us. **That’s why I have to do the thing I hate and ask you to donate today. If we win our race, I promise you will continue to have a Senator working her heart out in Washington and fighting for everyone who needs a hand. name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Protect our parks 🌳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Will you become a co-sponsor to protect our parks?
|
---
| | Derek --

Mark and a bi-partisan group of Senators have been working on parks legislation for over four years. Finally, this week, the President said he'd sign bills restoring our national parks and funding the Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF). **This is a real chance to make a lasting difference for our public lands in an often-hostile administration.**

Here's the good news: these bills already exist. It's critical that we pass the Restore Our Parks Act and full funding for LWCF. **[Will you become a citizen co-sponsor for this important legislation to protect our parks?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5aa/53d9897e/533e900f/1c898a48/83913455/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-ROPA-5?refcode=20200307_p_1_5__504__")**

Nationwide, there's a nearly $12 billion maintenance backlog in our parks, **and more than $1 billion is in Virginia alone.**

To drill down even further, Prince William Forest Park has a backlog of more than $24 million in deferred maintenance, threatening our hiking trails and campgrounds.

This bill would help reduce that backlog and get folks back in our parks AND provide 100,000 jobs across the country -- 10,000 in Virginia alone. **[Will you lend your support?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5aa/53d9897e/533e900f/1c898a48/83913455/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-ROPA-5?refcode=20200307_p_1_5__504__")**

Beyond the Restore Our Parks Act, Mark is working with a bipartisan group to fully fund LWCF. This fund was established in 1964 to protect our country's natural beauty, water resources, and preserve cultural heritage sites from battlefields in Virginia to Grand Teton National Park in Wyoming -- and everything in between. In the past, the Trump administration urged the Senate to slash this important program -- **that 's why it's urgent to get full funding _now_.**

There's a reason why both of these important bills have huge bipartisan support -- air and water pollution doesn't care what party you belong to. With the broad coalition supporting the Restore Our Parks Act and LWCF, we have the momentum to get this done. Let's prove that to the Trump administration.

**[>> Sign on to become a citizen co-sponsor and get the Restore Our Parks Act and LWCF over the finish line.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5aa/53d9897e/533e900f/1c898a48/83913455/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-ROPA-5?refcode=20200307_p_1_5__504__")**

Thank you for your support!

-- Team Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5aa/53d9897e/533e900f/1c898db7/83913455/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200307_p_1_5__504__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

| | It happened in 2008: in the Republican stronghold of North Carolina, President Barack Obama and my friend, the late US Senator Kay Hagan, won stunning upset victories. It happened _again_ in 2016: in spite of Donald Trump's efforts in the state, Roy Cooper was elected North Carolina's Democratic governor. So we know North Carolina is winnable. But will we win in 2020? That's up to us. [**Stand with me in support of Cal Cunningham, who has just been elected as the Democratic nominee for US Senate in North Carolina.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ee0a/6cd27893/53a04a7a/1590176d/1975029640/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-cunningham?refcode=2020-03-07-cal&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ee0a/6cd27893/53a04a7a/1590176d/1975029640/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-cunningham?refcode=2020-03-07-cal&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Cal is a former member of North Carolina's state Senate, a member of the US Army Reserve, and a father of two. And he helps lead a company that reduces waste, boosts recycling, and cleans up the environment. He's all about affordable access to health care for _all_ Americans, taking on the climate crisis, ending our nation's gun violence epidemic, battling corruption in DC, and _so_ much more. **Cal would be a valuable addition to the US Senate, and his victory would be key to a Democratic Senate and demoting Mitch McConnell.** You know what? After Cal won on Super Tuesday, the Cook Political Report upgraded this contest to "toss-up". So you better believe, McConnell is already aiming his fire at Cal. This is where we come in: our nationwide, grassroots movement must take a stand with Cal in North Carolina. [**Join me and let's get him elected. name: Hegar, MJ
subject: what this runoff means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Every dollar this grassroots team has raised has been crucial to our success

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890291/7f51f7bc/4c4627bc/4ef18ce3/2830050436/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

We're less than a week into the runoff, but I wanted to reach out and tell you how grateful I am for all your support so far. Every dollar this grassroots team has raised has been crucial to our success, and every donation is critical as we prepare to kick some ass in the next stage of this campaign. **[Can I count on you to chip in to help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890291/7f51f7bc/4c4627bc/4ef18ce2/2830050436/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200307.3nd__1033__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Sen. John Cornyn has been busy building a $12 million war chest -- that's why we have to come out of this runoff in the strongest possible position to defeat Sen. Cornyn. This campaign has been a whirlwind from start to finish. With hard work and support from this powerful team, we came out on top in the primary. But this race is only going to get tougher, and I could use help to stay strong and steady going into the next stage of the campaign. **[_Can I count on your help on this ride?_](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890291/7f51f7bc/4c4627bc/4ef18ce2/2830050436/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200307.3nd__1033__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

It takes a lot of money to travel all across Texas, reach out to undecided voters, and spread our message through digital and TV ads. There are STILL a lot of Texans who are undecided and **we need your help to reach them.**

Senator Cornyn is going to be fighting us for every voter all the way through November, and we need to make sure they're hearing our message first. **[That's why I'm asking for your help -- to reach out to those key swing voters who are waiting for a _fighter_ who will stick up for them in Washington.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890291/7f51f7bc/4c4627bc/4ef18ce2/2830050436/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200307.3nd__1033__&amount=10&recurring=true")** The more people we get to come out and vote in the runoff, the more who will stick with us all the way through to November.

Thanks for being part of our team, Peter!

\-- MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890291/7f51f7bc/4c4627bc/4ef18ce2/2830050436/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200307.3nd__1033__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Team Patty
subject: The path to a Democratic majority runs through the Midwest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Patty Murray launched her Sprint to 2020 because she knows what's at stake this November and she's doing everything she can to elect Democrats in tight Senate races across the country.
In our fight to elect a Democratic Senate majority this year, the Midwest is proving to be a pivotal battleground. That's why Patty is doubling down on her support for the Midwestern women who are running to flip red seats -- or keep them blue. Are you with her in the fight?
**[Make a $5 contribution now to support Barbara Bollier in Kansas, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, and Tina Smith in Minnesota in the crucial fight to take back the Senate in 2020.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200306-midwestern-moms?refcode=em200307i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
**Here's why these races are so important for Democrats to win:**
Kansas has recently become an important state to watch as suburban voters continue to distance themselves from President Trump and the GOP. In fact, the latest poll of the Senate race there shows Barbara Bollier TIED with her extreme Republican opponent. This race is one we can win -- but we have to stand with Barbara and ensure she has the resources to win.
In 2018, Iowa helped build the blue wave and elected Democrats in half of the state's congressional seats. This year, we can build on that progress by defeating a Republican incumbent who marches in lock-step with Mitch McConnell and President Trump. If we show our support, we can help Theresa Greenfield compete in this swing state -- and win.
And Minnesota is a swing state where President Trump only lost by a small margin -- and where he plans to spend millions to help the GOP succeed there in 2020. We can't let extreme conservatives defeat Senator Tina Smith because we need her voice in the Senate -- and without her, our path to taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell gets much more difficult.
**[If you are with Patty in the fight for a Democratic Senate majority, rush in your $5 contribution now to show your support for these Midwestern Democratic women.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200306-midwestern-moms?refcode=em200307i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200306-midwestern-moms?refcode=em200307i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
